creator: vovkasm@gmail.com
text:
Looks good for me (I'am already set mainteiner-feedback field to '+'). Now we should wait while someone with commit rights pay attention on this request.

Moreover, I'm totally ok if you want to be maintainer of this port (I'm not using HTML::FormHandler actively for 3-4 years), to do this you need to modify MAINTAINER field in Makefile in you patch.
